name: Check all PR feedback channels
prompt: I have an open PR with review comments. How do I check all the feedback channels?
expectations: Mentions checking all three channels: conversation comments, inline comments, and reviews
References the check-pr-feedback.sh script
Explains that different reviewers may post in different channels

name: Reply to inline comment
prompt: A reviewer left an inline comment on my PR. How do I reply to it?
expectations: References the reply-to-inline.sh script with COMMENT_ID and MESSAGE arguments
Mentions signing the reply with agent identity
Suggests also including the fix in a Fix Report conversation comment

name: Create a Fix Report
prompt: I've addressed the review feedback on my PR. How do I report what I fixed?
expectations: Shows Fix Report format with statuses: FIXED, WONTFIX, DEFERRED, QUESTION
FIXED includes commit hash and verification
Mentions posting as ONE conversation comment and tagging all reviewers
Uses post-fix-report.sh script to post the comment rather than raw gh pr comment

name: Handle duplicate feedback from multiple reviewers
prompt: Both CodeRabbit and a human reviewer flagged the same issue in my PR. How should I handle this?
expectations: Fix once, report once
Note all sources in the Fix Report
Tag all reviewers who provided feedback

name: Agent-reviewer posting format
prompt: I'm an agent reviewing a PR. Where and how should I post my review?
expectations: Post ONE top-level conversation comment, not inline comments
Group findings by severity (Blocking vs Optional)
Include file:line and symbol anchor with verification commands for blocking items

name: Invoke review agents when no feedback
prompt: I just opened a PR but there are no review comments yet. What should I do?
expectations: Runs check-pr-feedback.sh first to confirm all three channels are empty
Invokes review agents using invoke-review-agents.sh (all agents, no --agents filter)
Informs the user that trigger comments were posted and suggests re-checking after agents respond

name: Invoke specific review agents
prompt: Can you ask Gemini and Codex to review my PR?
expectations: Uses invoke-review-agents.sh with --agents gemini,codex
Does not invoke CodeRabbit or other agents not mentioned
Informs the user which agents were triggered

name: Loop mode review cycle
prompt: Start a review loop on my PR — keep fixing and re-invoking until no more feedback.
expectations: Recognizes loop mode from keyword 'loop'
Describes the cycle: invoke → check → fix → inline reply (with @github-user tag) → Fix Report → re-invoke → repeat
Fix Report includes re-invocation footer: 'Re-invoking review agents for next round.'
States termination conditions: empty feedback, reviewer approve, or user stops
